title: ToolTreaux 8.5 Inch Heavy Duty Scissors with Stainless Steel Blades NonSlip Grip
description:
Built for home, office, and crafting tasks, the ToolTreaux 8.5" Heavy Duty Scissors feature durable 3.5mm stainless steel blades for smooth, reliable cutting. The large 8.5" design offers added strength and control when trimming paper, fabric, cardboard, and light plastics, while the soft rubberized orange and black handles provide a comfortable, non-slip grip during use.

ToolTreaux 8.5 Inch Heavy Duty Scissors with Stainless Steel Blades NonSlip Grip
Built for home, office, and crafting tasks, the ToolTreaux 8.5" Heavy Duty Scissors feature durable 3.5mm stainless steel blades for smooth, reliable cutting. The large 8.5" design offers added strength and control when trimming paper, fabric, cardboard, and light plastics, while the soft rubberized orange and black handles provide a comfortable, non-slip grip during use.
Key Features
  • THICK 3.5MM STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - Built for durability and consistent cutting performance across a range of materials
  • MULTI-PURPOSE USE - Suitable for paper, fabric, cardboard, light plastic, and general household or craft tasks
  • COMFORTABLE NON-SLIP GRIP - Rubberized orange and black handles provide added control and reduce hand strain
  • BALANCED 8.5” DESIGN - Offers improved leverage and precision for both detailed and general cutting
  • EVERYDAY RELIABILITY - Designed for repeated use in home, office, or workshop environments
Specifications
MPN: TTX-567B-RY6
UPC: 810131700669
Overall Length: 8.5"
Blade Thickness: 3.5mm
Blade Material: Stainless Steel
Handle everyday and heavy-duty cutting tasks with the ToolTreaux 8.5" Heavy Duty Scissors. Designed for versatility and durability, these scissors feature 3.5mm thick stainless steel blades that provide reliable cutting performance across a variety of materials, including paper, fabric, cardboard, and light plastics.

The 8.5" overall length offers a balanced feel for improved control and leverage, while the orange and black rubberized grip handles help provide a secure, comfortable hold during extended use. Whether you're working on crafts, office projects, or general household tasks, these scissors are built to deliver consistent results.
